name: Kanji
ingredients: 500g Black Carrot (or 350 g Carrot + 150 g Beetroot as substitute)
process: Boil water and let it cool
Chop the black carrots into middle-sized pieces
Add chopped black carrots and mustard seeds to the jar
Add red chili powder and salt to the jar
Pour the cooled water into the jar and mix well

name: Saktu
ingredients: 1 glass Water or Milk (room temperature or lukewarm)
1–2 tsp Jaggery (Gur) or Honey (avoid honey if using hot milk)
process: Place 2–3 tbsp of barley flour into a tall glass or deep bowl. Add only about 2 tablespoons of liquid first.
Mix the flour and small amount of liquid into a thick, smooth paste – this prevents lumps.
Add Jaggery and Cardamom powder. If using Ghee, add it now. Mix well.
Slowly pour in the rest of the water or milk. Whisk vigorously until frothy.
Note: If using Honey, add it last and only if the liquid is not hot.
Drink it immediately as barley will settle. Keep a spoon handy to stir while sipping.
Can be refrigerated and reheated gently.
healthBenefits: Handles excess kapha and pitta doshas
classicalReference: Classification of foods - anna panavidhi - Charaka Samhita
Dietary Preparations including saktu - Sushruta Samhita
